name: Mexican Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chopped jalapeno peppers in a greased 8-inch pie plate.
2. Top the peppers with shredded cheese.
3. In a bowl, combine the eggs with salt and lemon pepper to taste.
4. Beat the mixture until smooth.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese and peppers.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until set.
7. Cut into wedges.
Yield: 6 servings.
